notes: v0.16.78 — Rift game-mode variants + node-weight rebalance + music duration fix. 3 VARIANTS PER GAME-MODE NODE, weighted random per encounter by difficulty (EASY → mostly A, BRUTAL → mostly C). CORE DEFENCE: SINGLE / DUAL CORE (both must survive) / SHRINKING (arena collapses). CHAIN LINKS: HEX × 5 ROUNDS / SPIRAL (outer→inner) / COLOR MATCH (centre indicator dictates the weak pad — wrong target hurts you). OVERLOAD GRID: RANDOM RESPAWN / CHAIN REACTION (overload boosts neighbours +25% heat) / TANK GRID (4 gens, 2× heat_max). NODE-WEIGHT REBALANCE — less COMBAT (40 → 22) + less HEAL (12 → 6), more HAZARD/SLIPSTREAM/STRAFE (5-6 → 11-12) and more MINI-BOSS (6 → 14). Rifts now get more bespoke encounters, fewer filler bot fights. MUSIC FIX — rift game-modes had a 4-min boss-track lottery; ARENA/CAPTURE/PAINT and the 3 rift game-modes now pick only SHORT tracks (< 180 s). BOSS pool (≥ 180 s) reserved for Boss Rush + rift BOSS finale. If a short track ends before the encounter timer, the conductor loops a fresh ARENA track instead of ending the round early. Windows only.
